title: Pre-operative orthopedic assessment
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

examination.text: Supports documenting pre-procedure assessment, history, examination, risk, suitability, investigations, consent, and an individualized clinician-entered care plan.
examination.rationale: Supports UAE patient assessment and individualized care-plan context for preoperative orthopaedic assessment; no decision is generated.
examination.evidence_extract: Supports documenting pre-procedure assessment, history, examination, risk, suitability, investigations, consent, and an individualized clinician-entered care plan.

exact_section.heading: Patient assessment and individualized care plan

medication.text: Supports previous anesthesia records and alerts plus age, comorbidity, medicines, allergy, surgery, pain, cognition, frailty, nutrition, lifestyle, psychological, functional, and chronic-pain risk assessment.
medication.rationale: Supports entered history and risk domains for preoperative orthopaedic assessment; no decision is generated.
medication.evidence_extract: Supports previous anesthesia records and alerts plus age, comorbidity, medicines, allergy, surgery, pain, cognition, frailty, nutrition, lifestyle, psychological, functional, and chronic-pain risk assessment.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Procedure, indication, surgeon, comorbidity, medicines, allergies, functional status, examination, tests, consent and optimization are absent.
No diagnosis, interpretation, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for preoperative orthopaedic assessment.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
